main [e1]
  heading "ask" [e2] [level=1]
  generic "Zero-cognitive-load querying and learning for agent skill environments." [e3]
  paragraph "is the natural-language front door to memory-backed context, persona" [e4]
    generic "ask" [e5]
  paragraph "consultation, fresh discovery, and high-reasoning synthesis. It lets a human ask" [e6]
  paragraph "normally while the system chooses the right retrieval, freshness, persona, and" [e7]
  paragraph "oracle path." [e8]
  paragraph "uses the model surfaces, subscriptions, APIs, and local providers available" [e9]
    generic "ask" [e10]
  paragraph "in the current environment: Codex subscription surfaces, OpenAI API access," [e11]
  paragraph "routes, local models, DeepSeek, Gemini, or other configured backends." [e12]
    generic "/scillm" [e13]
  generic "human asks naturally ↓ /ask resolves intent ↓ /memory provides durable context ↓ optiona..." [e14]
  paragraph "Memory recall is context, not evidence. Code and design" [e15]
    generic "Core principle:" [e16]
  paragraph "claims must still be grounded in inspected files, diffs, tests, or artifacts." [e17]
  heading "Quick Start" [e18] [level=2]
